items.title: Tilta Foldable Charging Station Introduced – 6-Channel NP-F Charging, Priority Fast-Charge Mode, TFT Status Display
items.summary: Tilta has introduced the Foldable Charging Station for L-Series/NP-F Battery Kits, a six-channel dock that tops up a full set of Sony-style NP-F batteries at once. It pairs a priority fast-charge mode…
